description: Unsupported LPI2C pin configuration on i.MX93 M33 firmware.
golden_patch: Replace kLPI2C_4PinUnidirectional with kLPI2C_2PinOpenDrain in target_workspace/mcu_firmware/main.c.
mock_uart_log_after_fix:
MCU Booting...
LPI2C2 Initialized
Build Passed: 0 Errors, 0 Warnings
user_prompt: Please compile the MCU project. If compilation fails, inspect the i.MX93 LPI2C pin configuration limitation and repair target_workspace/mcu_firmware/main.c until the build passes.

description: Yocto U-Boot recipe file is accidentally renamed, causing provider/dependency failure.
mock_uart_log_after_fix:
U-Boot 2023.04 for NXP i.MX93 EVK
Starting kernel ...
Mock Build successful. Image generated.
user_prompt: Please trigger the remote Yocto build for the MPU BSP. If a provider or recipe-missing error appears, analyze the Yocto log, identify the missing .bb file, restore it, and rebuild.

category: Device Tree and BSP Integration Errors
description: Device Tree node is corrupted by an appended unclosed LPI2C block.
golden_patch: Remove the appended malformed &lpi2c2 block from imx93-11x11-evk.dts.
mock_uart_log_after_fix:
Linux version 6.1.22-nxp
DTC syntax passed
i2c-2 initialized successfully
user_prompt: Please rebuild the Yocto project. If dtc reports a Device Tree syntax error, locate the corrupted DTS file and remove the malformed appended block.

description: Build can pass, but runtime validation must reject crash signatures and require expected UART behavior.
golden_patch: Use the board-supported LPI2C instance expected by the validation signature.
mock_uart_log_after_fix:
MCU Booting...
LPI2C1 Initialized
Peripheral validation passed
user_prompt: Please compile and validate the MCU firmware. The build may pass, but the repair is only successful if UART validation shows the expected LPI2C initialization without crash signatures.
